description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBlack and brown glossy handbag, two front pockets with metallic closures, two external zippers, two main zipped compartments, inner zipped pocket , one mobile pouch, two short handles, contrast stitched detailing along the edge and buckle embellishments.Material and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 25 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 10 cm
